workflowSteps.title: Create and sync local + Mission Control checklist
requirements: Local checklist.md exists for this restaurant

30 written reviews captured, or exact shortage/blocker documented
Review themes summary is usable for copy and pitch docs

workflowSteps.title: Route to one archetype, fork template, and build first preview

Template fork builds successfully with real content and preserved conversion links
No generic restaurant copy, fake claims, fake menu items, fake reviews, or fake ordering paths

workflowSteps.title: Run first full improvement pass

Mobile pass is explicitly checked with evidence

workflowSteps.title: Identify and implement top 3 improvements

workflowSteps.title: Add truthful AI concierge or record blocker

Fallbacks prevent fake reservations, unsupported promises, or invented facts

workflowSteps.title: Create sellable pitch doc

Pitch explains before/after delta in owner language
Evidence and preview links are embedded or linked

workflowSteps.title: Create owner battle cards

Demo path and proof points are clear

requirements.title: Local checklist.md exists for this restaurant
requirements.notes: Updated local checklist.md exists.

requirements.notes: Updated local checklist.json exists.

requirements.title: Mission Control root + child task metadata mirrors checklist paths, requirements, evidence, and current stage
Desktop and mobile screenshots captured
requirements.notes: Desktop/mobile homepage and menu screenshots captured in the OpenClaw browser.

requirements.title: Live site DOM/text scrape captured
requirements.notes: Homepage/menu DOM and text scrapes captured.

requirements.title: Audit names concrete conversion, credibility, mobile, and factual gaps
requirements.notes: Audit identifies homepage template artifact, conversion clarity, menu packaging, family/local proof, and selected pepper-01/Cuisine route.

requirements.title: Google Reviews opened in browser and sorted by Highest
requirements.notes: Google reviews were opened in the browser and sorted by Highest rating.

requirements.title: 30 written reviews captured, or exact shortage/blocker documented
requirements.notes: 30 written Highest-filter Google reviews captured into JSON and Markdown packets.

requirements.title: Review themes summary is usable for copy and pitch docs
requirements.notes: Review themes are usable for copy/pitch: family/Dino warmth, crispy thin crust, neighborhood bar vibe, longtime loyalty, Wise Guy/beer nuggets/meatball/pasta proof, takeout and dine-in reliability.

requirements.title: Exactly one archetype/template route is chosen and justified
requirements.notes: Routed to pepper-01, closest core archetype: Cuisine-style warm casual neighborhood pizza/order clarity.

requirements.title: Template fork builds successfully with real content and preserved conversion links
requirements.notes: Local Next.js fork builds successfully with real content and preserved call/menu/directions/site flows. npm run build and npm run typecheck passed; local preview returned HTTP 200 on port 3073.

requirements.title: No generic restaurant copy, fake claims, fake menu items, fake reviews, or fake ordering paths
requirements.notes: Reviewed and updated the build around verified Dino’s facts: Miller Rd/Lake in the Hills, call-first ordering, official menu pricing/items, hours, Google review proof, and no fake ordering/reservation claims.

requirements.title: Copy/visual rhythm feels specific to the restaurant and selected archetype
requirements.notes: Improvement pass ties the preview to Dino’s verified identity: family warmth, made-from-scratch thin crust, Miller Rd/Lake in the Hills location, Google review proof, beer/bar energy, and real menu favorites.

requirements.title: Order/reserve/call/directions/catering/events paths are accurate as applicable
requirements.notes: Direct call, official menu, directions, email, official site, and source-backed hours are preserved; unsupported reservation/ordering promises are intentionally not invented.

requirements.title: Mobile pass is explicitly checked with evidence
requirements.notes: Mobile preview screenshot captured after hiding decorative hero emoji on mobile; visual QA found no obvious broken layout, unreadable text, emoji overlap, or overflow.

requirements.title: Top 3 concrete improvements are named from audit/preview/QA
requirements.notes: Named three concrete improvements from audit/preview/QA: Google proof section, mobile hero declutter, and persistent mobile menu access.

requirements.title: All three improvements are implemented
requirements.notes: Implemented all three improvements across content.ts, ConfettiHero.tsx, and TopNavSimple.tsx.

requirements.title: Each improvement has before/after evidence
requirements.notes: Attached top-3 doc, before/after mobile nav screenshots, after desktop/mobile preview screenshots, and build/typecheck evidence.

requirements.title: Concierge KB only uses verified restaurant facts
requirements.notes: Concierge KB is source-locked to verified address, phone, hours, menu facts, review themes, and safe handoffs.

requirements.title: Short transcript proves useful behavior
requirements.notes: Short transcript covers first-order recommendation, family dine-in context, hours, and directions.

requirements.title: Fallbacks prevent fake reservations, unsupported promises, or invented facts
requirements.notes: Concierge UI and KB explicitly forbid placing orders, quoting live waits, guaranteeing delivery, inventing reservations, or unsupported promises.

requirements.title: Pitch is specific to restaurant, neighborhood/cuisine, reviews, and conversion gaps
requirements.notes: Pitch is specific to Dino’s Lake in the Hills identity, thin-crust/deep-dish/pasta menu, Google review proof, and current-site artifact gap.

requirements.title: Pitch explains before/after delta in owner language
requirements.notes: Pitch explains before/after delta in owner language: from thin/template-debris homepage to call-first, menu-first, proof-backed preview.

requirements.title: Evidence and preview links are embedded or linked

requirements.title: Likely owner objections have concise answers

requirements.title: Demo path and proof points are clear

requirements.title: Risks/unknowns are called out truthfully
requirements.notes: Battle cards call out public preview URL, MC writeback, hours/specials confirmation, provider/order flow confirmation, and pending QA rounds.

requirements.title: QA round 1 completed with screenshots, findings, fixes, and MC writeback
requirements.notes: QA round 1 completed with screenshots, findings/fixes, build/typecheck result, and remaining blockers documented.

requirements.title: QA round 2 completed with screenshots, findings, fixes, and MC writeback
requirements.notes: QA round 2 completed with desktop/mobile screenshots for home/about/contact, page audit JSON, build/typecheck pass, metadata/OG fix, mobile CTA polish, contact map CTA fix, and tap-target fixes.

requirements.title: QA round 3 completed with final sell-readiness screenshots, fixes, and MC writeback

doneCriteria: Mission Control lead has a simple sales status and current metadata.build_stage.
Mission Control parent task metadata.requirements mirrors this checklist.
All required checklist rows are passed.
Three QA rounds are logged with screenshot evidence.
Preview URL, pitch doc, outreach draft, and delivery evidence are attached.
